subject: crypto: cavium - Replace mdelay with msleep in cpt_device_init

features.path_conditions: Caller is reachable only from sleepable (process) context such as PCI .probe — busy-waiting via mdelay is unnecessary; msleep should be used.
features.fit_test_reasoning: (1) Resource-like: API choice (mdelay vs msleep) substitutes for resource ownership. (2) The 'release' analog is the correct sleepable API. (3) Path condition = caller reachable from sleepable entry. (4) Bug pattern: busy-wait in sleepable context. Recast as a wrong-API-in-context pattern, the four-feature scaffold applies.
